name: io.github.andrezani/outpost
title: Outpost
description: Social media API and MCP server for AI agents. Publish to X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Instagram, Reddit, Bluesky, and Threads from a single endpoint. Every error includes agentHint — a plain English instruction for your LLM on exactly what to do next.

environmentVariables.name: OUTPOST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Outpost API key (starts with sa_). Get one at outpost.dev.

environmentVariables.name: OUTPOST_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Outpost instance. Defaults to https://api.outpost.dev — override only if self-hosting.
